tools.name: delete_files
tools.description: Deletes all files matching a pattern inside a folder. No file ID is required; the operation affects every match.

pattern.description: Glob pattern applied to file names, e.g. *.log

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: Lists files available in a directory.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Reads the full content of a file by its exact path.

file_id.description: Absolute path of the file to read
